mission.title: tikv: Make TiKV compilable with `cargo build`
mission.description: Make TiKV compilable with `cargo build`. Requested by 7+ users.

steps.title: Check current tikv deployment
steps.description:
Verify your tiup --version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n tikv -l app.kubernetes.io/name=tikv
helm list -n tikv 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working tikv installation.

steps.title: Review tikv configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant tikv configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n tikv -l app.kubernetes.io/name=tikv
kubectl get configmap -n tikv -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=tikv
```
Currently TiKV can't be compiled with `cargo build`. It's not friendly with IDEs. Please take a look, thanks!

steps.title: Apply the fix for Make TiKV compilable with `cargo build`
steps.description:
###  What have you changed?

Add `protobuf-codec` as a default feature, as we need either `protobuf-codec` or `prost-codec`

###  What is the type of the changes?

Pick one of the following and delete the others:

- Bugfix (a change which fixes an issue)

###  How is the PR tested?

- Manually, build TiKV using Clion, or just `cargo build`

###  Does this PR affect documentation (docs) or should it be mentioned in the release notes?

No

###  Does this PR affect `tidb-ansible`?

No

###  Refer

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n tikv -l app.kubernetes.io/name=tikv
kubectl get events -n tikv --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Make TiKV compilable with `cargo build`" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
###  What have you changed?

Add `protobuf-codec` as a default feature, as we need either `protobuf-codec` or `prost-codec`

###  What is the type of the changes?

Pick one of the following and delete the others:

- Bugfix (a change which fixes an issue)

###  How is the PR tested?

- Manually, build TiKV using Clion, or just `cargo build`

###  Does this PR affect documentation (docs) or should

See the source issue and linked PR for the complete solution details.

prerequisites.description: A running TiKV cluster (standalone or deployed on Kubernetes via TiDB Operator). TiUP and tikv-ctl are the primary CLI tools for managing TiKV.
